findings.evidence: PR lines 202-203 and 240-241 use `(R H : Type u) : CommAlgCat.{u} R ⥤ MonCat.{u}` / `GrpCat.{u}`, while Mathlib has `CommAlgCat` with independent carrier universe (`Mathlib/Algebra/Category/CommAlgCat/Basic.lean:24,31`) and `Bialgebra`/`HopfAlgebra` with independent algebra universe (`Mathlib/RingTheory/Bialgebra/Basic.lean:57`, `Mathlib/RingTheory/HopfAlgebra/Basic.lean:65`).
findings.fix: Use independent universes, e.g. `R : Type u`, `H : Type v`, domain `CommAlgCat.{w} R`, and target `MonCat.{max u v w}` / `GrpCat.{max u v w}`, and generalize the simp lemmas accordingly.
findings.issue: `convMonoidFunctor` and `convGroupFunctor` force `R`, `H`, the `CommAlgCat` value algebras, and `MonCat`/`GrpCat` all into the same universe.

summary: The new functors package the intended construction, but their signatures are under-generalized by collapsing all universes to one level.
